taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Machine Learning, Classification, Regression, Feature Selection, Python
skill_match_scores: Machine Learning:1.0, Classification:1.0, Regression:0.5, Feature Selection:0.5, Python:1.0
must_have_quals: Master's degree in Math, Statistics, Data Science, Computer Science, Physics, Bioinformatics or another quantitative field with a foundation in statistics, Minimum of 2 years of experience, Proficiency with machine learning techniques (e.g., classification, regression, and feature selection), Proficiency using Python, SQL, Linux shell scripting, AWS, Docker, and Git
preferred_quals: Experience with LLM or transformer-based algorithms and methods, Familiarity with GPUs, deep learning, cloud-based deployment, and software development, Familiarity with machine learning infrastructure and frameworks, CI/CD, and MLOps, Experience with clinical trial data or large healthcare datasets
core_responsibilities: You are a Data Scientist who will design new AI-driven features integrated with Medidata products, Develop and validate machine learning models for novel clinical trial applications, Develop prototypes that communicate how models can be used within customer-facing products, Evaluate and assess novel tools, algorithms, and technologies to be an AI community enabler, Build end-to-end machine learning pipelines from data curation, processing, model building, model evaluation, to model deployment for production
job_summary: Medidata Solutions is a leader in powering smarter treatments and healthier people through digital solutions for clinical trials. The Data Scientist role involves designing AI-driven features, developing machine learning models for clinical trial applications, and building end-to-end machine learning pipelines.
